title: Telemedicine | Aurora Derm
description: Remote dermatology with clear first guidance, careful diagnosis, a responsible in-clinic handoff, and follow-up in Quito.
heading: Dermatology telemedicine in Quito

heroImage.alt: Telemedicine intake with clinical context and imaging

lead: Telemedicine works best when it helps you move sooner without losing medical oversight or clarity about what comes next.

thesis.title: Remote care when it truly helps
thesis.body: We decide what can be handled remotely, what needs closer watch, and when it makes more sense to see you in clinic.

statement.title: Useful telemedicine, with clear limits and medical oversight
statement.alt: Remote dermatology review with follow-up and adjustment

internalMessage.description: We review context, risk, and progression to decide whether remote follow-up is enough or whether an in-person exam is already the better move.

blocks.title: How it works
items: You share key history and photos with enough context to guide an initial review.
We prioritize risk to decide whether the case can be handled remotely.
We send an initial plan, clear care steps, and a follow-up window when needed.
If warning signs appear, we speed the move into clinic.

blocks.title: When it usually fits
items: Previously assessed inflammatory flares that need an adjustment
Follow-up on active treatment plans after a recent change
Questions about how things are evolving between reviews
Initial guidance before arranging a clinic visit

blocks.title: When clinic review makes more sense
items: Rapidly changing, bleeding, or non-healing lesions
Intense pain, accelerated spread, or functional impact
Insufficient response to the first remote plan
Need for procedures or direct diagnostic examination

initiatives.title: Visual triage
initiatives.copy: A first read through clinical photos to prioritize risk and response timing.

initiatives.title: Flare control
initiatives.copy: Remote adjustments that help contain flares between reviews and keep care moving.

initiatives.title: Clinic handoff
initiatives.copy: A move into clinic when the way a lesion behaves calls for direct examination.

initiatives.title: Hybrid follow-up in Quito
initiatives.copy: A model built for Quito, combining remote follow-up with timely in-clinic review.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If you want to compare other care options afterwards, you can go back to services and choose the one that fits best.
